predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality (a background status directly assertable from case facts).

predicates.name: is_subsidiary
predicates.description: The company is a subsidiary of another company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company of another company.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company under applicable law.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold of 10 in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold of 900,000 euros (exclusive of VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold of 450,000 euros in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three micro-company criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company in the financial year: it is a small company with legal personality, is neither a subsidiary nor a parent company, and does not exceed more than one of the three statutory criteria on the balance sheet date of the last closed financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company exclusive of value added tax in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.
